hero.subtitle: Enterprise-grade AI transcription with speaker diarization. 100% ephemeral. Impossibly fast.

features.heading: Built for the next generation of
features.subtitle: Harness the power of state-of-the-art neural networks to decode every syllable with surgical precision.
features.card1Desc: Leveraging OpenAI's latest architecture for unparalleled multi-language support and background noise cancellation.
features.card2Desc: Automatically detect and label individual speakers in any conversation, perfect for podcasts and board meetings.
features.card3Desc: Your data is yours alone. All files are automatically purged from our servers immediately after transcription.

cta.title: Ready to transform your sound?
cta.subtitle: Join 10,000+ creators and enterprises who trust Voxify for their critical transcription needs.

footer.tagline: Transmuting sound into clarity. The world's fastest AI transcription engine for high-stakes professionals.

upload.dragDrop: or drag & drop your file here

paywall.paymentNote: Payments securely processed via MercadoPago. Cancel anytime.

about.subtitle: We are on a mission to organize the world's audio and make it universally accessible, searchable, and useful.
about.genesisPara1: Voxify was born out of a simple necessity: to transform sound into actionable data at the speed of thought. Traditional transcription services were either too slow, too inaccurate, or fundamentally compromised privacy.
about.genesisPara2: By leveraging state-of-the-art Neural Networks—specifically heavily optimized versions of OpenAI's Whisper—we engineered an infrastructure built for scale, privacy, and impossible speeds.
about.v1Desc: We enforce a strict zero-retention policy. Your audio files are purged milliseconds after processing.
about.v2Desc: Our bare-metal H100 clusters deliver up to 100x real-time transcription speeds.
about.v3Desc: Advanced voice-feature extraction maps words to individual speakers flawlessly.

contact.subtitle: Have questions about an Enterprise plan? Need custom Whisper models? Our engineering team is ready to help.
contact.sidebarText: We specialize in high-throughput audio pipelines. Whether you're processing 100 hours or 100,000 hours of audio per month, Voxify can be tailored to your precise infrastructure needs.
contact.supportText: Available for PRO & Enterprise tiers directly via the Dashboard.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your audio volume and specific needs...
contact.sentToast: Your message has been sent successfully. Our team will contact you shortly!

featuresPage.subtitle: Dive deep into the technology powering the world's fastest speech-to-text service.
